findings.evidence: Line 10: '# The automorphism group of a multiquadratic field is elementary abelian of exponent two'; lines 12-15 of the same docstring and the PR description both state the `(ℤ/2)ⁿ` identification is a separate later step.
findings.fix: Rename the title to match what the file actually establishes, e.g. '# The automorphism group of a multiquadratic field has exponent two and is abelian', or '# The automorphism group of a multiquadratic field is an elementary abelian 2-group (exponent-two and abelian part)' with the parenthetical honest about scope.
findings.issue: The module title 'The automorphism group of a multiquadratic field is elementary abelian of exponent two' claims more than the file proves: 'elementary abelian' is the statement `Gal ≅ (ℤ/2)ⁿ`, which requires a cardinality/dimensionality input. The body of the same docstring and the PR description both defer that identification to a later step; the title contradicts them.

summary: The two theorem docstrings and the body of the module docstring accurately describe what the file proves, but the module title overclaims: it calls the group 'elementary abelian', which subsumes the `(ℤ/2)ⁿ` identification that the file itself defers to a later step.
